expectations.text: Both reviewer agents (checklist and bogey) were dispatched
expectations.evidence: Process log shows Step 6 (checklist-reviewer) and Step 7 (bogey-reviewer) both executed inline following their agent prompts.
Process log Step 4.2: 'universal-rules.md (always loaded), requirements-rules.md (type-specific for requirements)'

expectations.text: cross-doc-rules.md was loaded (doc references FR-NNN and NFR-NNN IDs)
expectations.evidence: Process log Step 4.2: 'cross-doc-rules.md (conditional — FR-NNN and NFR-NNN patterns found in document)'. Trigger patterns: FR-001, FR-002, FR-005, NFR-001-004.

expectations.text: At least one finding about missing requirement IDs
expectations.evidence: Critical finding 'requirements-missing-ids' (REQ-R02, confidence 98): 'Two functional requirements lack unique IDs. Line 11 and line 12 have no FR-NNN identifier.'

expectations.text: At least one finding about non-EARS language (should/can instead of shall)
expectations.evidence: Important finding 'non-ears-notation' (REQ-R01, confidence 95): 'Line 11 uses "should" instead of "shall", Line 12 uses "can" instead of "shall"'. Also notes constitution violation CONST-QUAL-01.

expectations.text: At least one finding about vague/non-measurable NFR criteria
expectations.evidence: Two findings converge: Important 'vague-nfr-no-quantification' (UNIV-04, confidence 98) flags 'fast/secure/good' and Important 'nfr-missing-quantitative-criteria' (REQ-R04, confidence 98) flags missing acceptance criteria. Bogey-reviewer convergence noted.
10 total findings: 2 Critical, 6 Important, 2 Suggestions. All 7 planted defects caught plus 3 additional legitimate quality findings.

expectations.text: Report format matches SKILL.md section 9 with severity grouping and summary line
expectations.evidence: Report has severity-grouped findings, rule ID attribution, Strengths section, Summary '2 Critical, 6 Important, 2 Suggestions / Sources: 8 rule-based, 2 structural/cross-doc'.

expectations.text: Document was NOT modified by the review
expectations.evidence: Process log Step 10: 'Document was NOT modified. Advisory only.'

notes: Perfect score. All 7 planted defects detected plus 3 additional legitimate findings. Bogey-reviewer convergence noted on vague NFRs and non-EARS language — demonstrating ensemble value.
